segments.text: When he came down from the mountain, great multitudes followed him.
Behold, a leper came to him and worshiped him, saying,
Lord, if you want to, you can make me clean.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Jesus stretched out his hand and touched him, saying,
I want to. Be made clean.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Immediately his leprosy was cleansed.
Jesus said to him,
See that you tell nobody; but go, show yourself to the priest, and offer the gift that Moses commanded, as a testimony to them.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When he came into Capernaum, a centurion came to him, asking him for help,
saying,
Lord, my servant lies in the house paralyzed, grievously tormented.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus said to him,
I will come and heal him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The centurion answered,
Lord, I’m not worthy for you to come under my roof. Just say the word, and my servant will be healed.
segments.speaker: The centurion

segments.text: For I am also a man under authority, having under myself soldiers. I tell this one, ‘Go,’ and he goes; and tell another, ‘Come,’ and he comes; and tell my servant, ‘Do this,’ and he does it.
segments.speaker: The centurion

segments.text: When Jesus heard it, he marveled and said to those who followed,
Most certainly I tell you, I haven’t found so great a faith, not even in Israel.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you that many will come from the east and the west, and will sit down with Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob in the Kingdom of Heaven,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: but the children of the Kingdom will be thrown out into the outer darkness. There will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus said to the centurion,
Go your way. Let it be done for you as you have believed.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: His servant was healed in that hour.
When Jesus came into Peter’s house, he saw his wife’s mother lying sick with a fever.
He touched her hand, and the fever left her. So she got up and served him. [^27]
When evening came, they brought to him many possessed with demons. He cast out the spirits with a word, and healed all who were sick,
that it might be fulfilled which was spoken through Isaiah the prophet, saying,
He took our infirmities and bore our diseases.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now when Jesus saw great multitudes around him, he gave the order to depart to the other side.
A scribe came and said to him,
Teacher, I will follow you wherever you go.
segments.speaker: scribe came and

segments.text: Jesus said to him,
The foxes have holes and the birds of the sky have nests, but the Son of Man has nowhere to lay his head.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Another of his disciples said to him,
Lord, allow me first to go and bury my father.
segments.speaker: Another of his disciples

segments.text: But Jesus said to him,
Follow me, and leave the dead to bury their own dead.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When he got into a boat, his disciples followed him.
Behold, a violent storm came up on the sea, so much that the boat was covered with the waves; but he was asleep.
The disciples came to him and woke him up, saying,
Save us, Lord! We are dying!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He said to them,
Why are you fearful, O you of little faith?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then he got up, rebuked the wind and the sea, and there was a great calm.
The men marveled, saying,
What kind of man is this, that even the wind and the sea obey him?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When he came to the other side, into the country of the Gergesenes, [^28] two people possessed by demons met him there, coming out of the tombs, exceedingly fierce, so that nobody could pass that way.
Behold, they cried out, saying,
What do we have to do with you, Jesus, Son of God? Have you come here to torment us before the time?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Now there was a herd of many pigs feeding far away from them.
The demons begged him, saying,
If you cast us out, permit us to go away into the herd of pigs.
segments.speaker: The demons

segments.text: He said to them,
Go!
segments.speaker: The demons

segments.text: They came out and went into the herd of pigs; and behold, the whole herd of pigs rushed down the cliff into the sea and died in the water.
Those who fed them fled and went away into the city and told everything, including what happened to those who were possessed with demons.
Behold, all the city came out to meet Jesus. When they saw him, they begged that he would depart from their borders.
